ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Reinforcement learning algorithm used (e.g., DQN, PPO, SAC) */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Environment name (e.g., CartPole, MountainCar) */,
  "max_timesteps" INTEGER /* Maximum number of timesteps for the experiment */,
  "evaluation_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency at which the experiment is evaluated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timesteps" (
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestep entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being logged */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Timestep number within the experiment */,
  "avg_action_dist" TEXT /* Average action distribution (array format) */,
  "logstd_action_dist" TEXT /* Log standard deviation of action distribution (array format) */,
  "total_reward" REAL /* Total reward received at this timestep */,
  "done" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the episode is done */,
  "next_observation" TEXT /* Next observation in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the timestep was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the timestep was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timesteps_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action entry */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timestep during which the action was taken */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions taken in the format of an array */,
  "action_probabilities" TEXT /* Probabilities of each action taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward entry */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timestep associated with the reward */,
  "original_reward" REAL /* Original reward value received */,
  "reward" REAL /* Processed reward value */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward received (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation entry */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timestep associated with the observation */,
  "human_obs" TEXT /* Human observations recorded during the timestep */,
  "obs" TEXT /* Raw observations recorded at the timestep */,
  "done" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the episode is done */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_experiments" (
  "user_experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for user-experiment mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-experiment mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-experiment mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_experiments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was logged */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
